u19_2008.historicalImportance: The launching pad of the legend. Captained India U19 to a historic title in Malaysia, announcing his leadership ability and batting talent to the world.
u19_2008.emotionalImpact: Hope and prophecy. The beginning of a long journey of expectation and leadership.
u19_2008.recommendedSection: Life Journey (The Road to Greatness Timeline)

world_cup_2011.historicalImportance: Lifting the ultimate global title on home soil at Wankhede Stadium. Played a vital 35-run knock in the final to stabilize the chase after early wickets.
world_cup_2011.emotionalImpact: Deep reverence, childhood dream fulfilled, lifting Sachin Tendulkar on shoulders, the birth of national expectations.

champions_trophy_2013.historicalImportance: India's undefeated run in England. Top-scored in a rain-reduced final (43 off 34) against England to defend the title under immense pressure.
champions_trophy_2013.emotionalImpact: Fierce confidence, proof of big-match temperament, building the core of India's golden limited-overs era.

test_mace_2018.historicalImportance: Held the No.1 ICC Test ranking for 5 consecutive years (2016-2021). Conquered conditions worldwide and revolutionized India's fast-bowling culture.
test_mace_2018.emotionalImpact: Uncompromising dominance, steel, pride of the long format, captaincy pinnacle.
test_mace_2018.recommendedSection: Test Cricket (Section: KING OF THE LONG FORMAT)

border_gavaskar_2018.historicalImportance: The first-ever Test series victory on Australian soil in Indian cricket history. Conquered the ultimate away challenge.
border_gavaskar_2018.emotionalImpact: History made, overseas vindication, silencing critics in their own backyard.

t20_world_cup_2024.historicalImportance: The ultimate T20 international closure. Top-scored with a crucial 76 in the final, securing the trophy for India and retiring at the absolute peak of T20Is.
t20_world_cup_2024.emotionalImpact: Mission complete, tears of joy, relief, the perfect emotional farewell to a format he dominated for a decade.

champions_trophy_2025.historicalImportance: Lifting global ICC silverware in the ODI format once again, solidifying India's tournament dominance in the modern era.
champions_trophy_2025.emotionalImpact: Fulfillment, redemption, kissing the silver prize at the tail end of his career.

rcb_trophy.historicalImportance: Breaking the 17-year IPL drought. Guided RCB to back-to-back championship breakthroughs in 2025 and 2026, solidifying his eternal franchise legacy.
rcb_trophy.emotionalImpact: Pure elation, tears of loyalty, Chinnaswamy explosion, the wait is finally over.
rcb_trophy.recommendedSection: RCB Legacy (Section: THE WAIT IS OVER)
